name: Nuevo Leon (Mexico)

colors.symbolism: the field and details of the arms
the rivers and the loyalty of the state
agriculture and the Sierra Madre Oriental
the sun and details of the arms

description: A white field with the coat of arms of the state of Nuevo Leon centred.
history: Nuevo Leon has no officially adopted state flag; the design shown — a white field bearing the state coat of arms — is in de facto use to represent the state.

features.symbolism: A white field charged with the state coat of arms, in the typical pattern of Mexican state flags.

features.role: coat of arms of Nuevo Leon
features.symbolism: The arms reference the Cerro de la Silla — the saddle-shaped mountain that overlooks Monterrey — together with industrial and agricultural emblems of the state, recalling Nuevo Leon's role as one of Mexico's leading industrial centres.
